title: PJM Dispatched Reserves Verified JSON API
description:
This dataset contains the five-minute verified quantity, prices, and requirement for each of the reserve types in PJM. This data is not updated on the day following the current market day. Preliminary real-time values can be found [here](https://www.gridstatus.io/datasets/pjm_dispatched_reserves_prelim). 

Reserve types, for both the PJM RTO and Mid-Atlantic/Dominion Reserve subzones include:

- Primary Reserves
- Synchronized Reserves
- Thirty-Minute Reserves (only PJM RTO Reserve Zone)
